---
title: "Quarto Toolchain Smoke Test"
format: html
---

## Purpose

This document verifies that the shared `~/repos` development container can render
a Quarto document with embedded R code.

```{r}
library(jsonlite)

toolchain_status <- list(
  r_available = TRUE,
  quarto_render = TRUE,
  portfolio_project = "assessment-intelligence"
)

toJSON(toolchain_status, pretty = TRUE)
```
